brand_identity.name: NSRSN
brand_identity.aesthetic: Nordic Winter, Industrial Precision, Dark Mode, Amber Warning Lights

layout_strategies.spacing: Generous. Use p-24 or py-32 for section vertical padding.
layout_strategies.grid: Bento Grid (Mode A) for benefits. Asymmetric layouts for features.
layout_strategies.border_radius: rounded-none for strict industrial feel, or rounded-lg for slight modernization. Let's use rounded-sm (4px) for a hardware feel.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-semibold hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:bg-white/10 rounded-sm px-8 py-4 backdrop-blur-sm

cards.style: Glassmorphism with a technical edge. 1px border-white/10. bg-[#0F1623]/80 backdrop-blur-md. Hover: border-primary/50.

navbar.style: Fixed, glassmorphism. Border-b border-white/5. h-20 flex items-center.

preferences.scroll: Parallax for background images. Fade-up for text.

visual_enhancers.noise: Overlay a subtle fixed noise texture opacity-5 to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use amber distinct glows behind key products or headlines.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React. Stroke width 1.5px. Color: text-secondary or text-primary for active.

hero.content: Video background or Dark Image with Amber Overlay. H1: 'Winter-Proofing Autonomous Mobility'.

problem.layout: Split screen or heavy text with data viz.
problem.focus: Cold, dangerous, inefficient. Use blue/grey tones.

solution.focus: The Stud. Amber light. Warmth. Safety.

universal_guidelines: Always use data-testid for interactive elements.
Do not use generic gradients. Use the specific amber glow.
Ensure contrast ratios are high (Amber on Black is good, but check grey text).
instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the dark theme global css. Then build the Navbar and Hero. Use the provided image URLs. Focus on the 'Amber' glow effect against the dark background as the signature look.
